generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw a local emergency drill where they had to evacuate a whole neighborhood because of a simulated cyber attack on the power grid. Took hours to get everything back to normal. Makes you think - maybe we should be pushing for more civil defense preparedness at the local level. Not about paranoia, just common sense. How many of you have even heard about these drills? #CommunitySafety #CivilDefense
